description: A biomedical engineer needs a 'negative' mold of the skull for packaging design using the pre-loaded CT Cranium DICOM scan—a solid block representing the full scan volume with the skull anatomy subtracted as a void. Generate a 3D surface from an inverted bone segmentation mask (Bone preset, 226–3071 HU) and export it as a binary STL file to /home/ga/Documents/negative_mold.stl. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
